_publications._publicationTitle: Optical dopamine monitoring with dLight1 reveals mesolimbic phenotypes in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Nf1+/- putative dopaminergic neurons (n = 29) had increased input resistance (Rm; left; unpaired t-test; t48 = 2.97, p=0.005) and decreased capacitance (Cm; right; t48 = 2.54, p=0.01)
details: Nf1+/- dopaminergic neurons had increased input resistance (t48 = 2.97, p=0.005) and decreased capacitance (t48 = 2.54, p=0.01)
